biological_replicate: we generated IPSC lines from 2 ALS6 patients carrying the FUSR521H mutation
technical_replicate: Experiments were performed in at least biological triplicates
experimental_design: FUSR521H MNs are more sensitive to oxidative stress compared to healthy controls
number_of_biological_replicates: 2 ALS6 patients and 2 IPSC lines from phenotypically healthy relatives
number_of_samples: 2 ALS6 patients and 2 IPSC lines from phenotypically healthy relatives
